string.name: pair_help_offline_tip
string.value: If the device shows offline, it may be due to:

string.name: pair_help_offline
string.value:
1. Bluetooth is not enabled 
2. Device is too far away 
3. Device has been reset

string.name: pair_help_again_tip
string.value: If it cannot be recovered, please try the following to reset the device:

string.name: pair_help_again
string.value:
1. Press and hold the button for 10 seconds 
2. Tap to reconnect

string.name: scanning_device_tip
string.value: Please make sure Bluetooth is enabled on both the watch and phone

string.name: device_info_unbind_tip
string.value: After unbinding, the device will no longer communicate with "Health". Continue?

string.name: access_bluetooth
string.value: Bluetooth permission is required for health management

string.name: device_bluetooth_dialog_message
string.value: App does not have Bluetooth permission. Go to App Center to configure.
